market.summary: Global art market grew 4% to $59.6 billion in 2025, led by US (44% share) and resilient high-end auction sales (up 9%). Dealer sales increased 2%. Market sentiment remains cautiously optimistic for 2026 amid geopolitical uncertainty.
keyTrends: Global art sales hit $59.6B, 4% growth YoY
Public auction sales grew 9%, dealer sales 2%
K-shaped recovery with strong high-end segment
Rise in domestic sales for mid-sized galleries

highlights: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 VIP preview days now underway (Public: Mar 27-29)
New 'Encounters' sector curation and debut of 'Echoes' sector at ABHK
Digital art 'Zero 10' initiative makes Asia debut in HK
Vivian Maier estate 'Important Photographs' sale closing today
Market challenges: rising operational costs, tariffs, geopolitical headwinds
